com.irurueta.units.MagneticFluxDensityUnit

      Attempts to determine a magnetic flux density unit within a string representation.

      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static MagneticFluxDensityUnit[] MagneticFluxDensityUnit.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void MagneticFluxDensity.add​(double value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density value and unit and updates current magnetic flux density instance.
      static double MagneticFluxDensity.add​(double value1, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit1, double value2, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit2, MagneticFluxDensityUnit resultUnit)
      Ads two magnetic flux density values and units and returns the result.
      void MagneticFluxDensity.add​(java.lang.Number value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density value and unit and updates current magnetic flux density instance.
      static java.lang.Number MagneticFluxDensity.add​(java.lang.Number value1, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit1, java.lang.Number value2, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit2, MagneticFluxDensityUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two magnetic flux density values and units and returns the result.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.addAndReturnNew​(double value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit, MagneticFluxDensityUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density value and unit and returns a new magnetic flux density instance using provided unit.
      static MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.addAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity arg1, MagneticFluxDensity arg2, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Adss two magnetic flux density instances.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.addAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity b, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density to current instance and returns a new magnetic flux density instance.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensity.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit, MagneticFluxDensityUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided magnetic flux density value and unit and returns a new magnetic flux density instance using provided unit.
      static double MagneticFluxDensityConverter.convert​(double input, MagneticFluxDensityUnit inputUnit, MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a magnetic flux density value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void MagneticFluxDensityConverter.convert​(MagneticFluxDensity magneticFluxDensity, MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.

      Converts a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.
      static java.lang.Number MagneticFluxDensityConverter.convert​(java.lang.Number input, MagneticFluxDensityUnit inputUnit, MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a magnetic flux density value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensityConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity input, MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.
      java.lang.String MagneticFluxDensityFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided magnetic flux density value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String MagneticFluxDensityFormatter.formatAndConvertMetric​(java.lang.Number value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit)
      Formats and converts provided magnetic flux density value and unit using metric unit system.

      Returns unit string representation.

      Subtracts provided magnetic flux density value and unit and updates current magnetic flux density instance.
